component.name: Ansible Jane
component.summary: Manage Ansible Automation Platform with an AI assistant

description.p: Ansible Jane is a multiplatform app for managing Ansible Automation Platform (AAP). Authenticate with your AAP instance, browse job templates, launch playbooks, monitor job status, handle workflow approvals, and interact with Jane, an AI assistant that works with local models (Ollama) or frontier providers through tool-use and MCP.

ul.li: Connect to multiple AAP instances simultaneously
Browse and launch job templates and workflows
Monitor job status with live polling and stdout output
Workflow visualization with node cards and connectors
AI assistant with 61 local tools for natural-language AAP interaction
MCP integration for extended tool coverage
